holdings.infoBox: COPA is an equity ETF with a total of 57 individual holdings. The top holdings are Jiujiang Defu Technology stock at 10.36%, Freeport-McMoRan at 8.32%, BHP Group at 4.65%, First Quantum Minerals at 4.24%, and Teck Resources at 3.75%.

overview.description: The Themes Copper Miners ETF (COPA) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the BITA Global Copper Mining Select index. The fund tracks an index comprised of global companies that derive significant revenue from copper mining, exploration, and refining. Securities are weighted based on the amount of revenue and level of exposure tied to the copper industry, subject to capping constraints and flooring conditions. COPA was launched on Sep 24, 2024 and is issued by Themes.
infoTable: BITA Global Copper Mining Select Index
